news.headline: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. closes $20M private placement of common stock through Raymond James & Janney Montgomery.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on October 16, 2024, GBank Financial Holdings Inc. revealed the successful closure of a Private Placement Offering worth $20.0 million. The Company, which owns GBank, shared this milestone enthusiastically. Raymond James & Associates, Inc. and Janney Montgomery were involved in this significant financial deal.

news.headline: Willis Lease Finance Corp. (NASDAQ: WLFC) to reveal Q3 2024 results on Nov. 4th, before Nasdaq opening.
news.summary: Willis Lease Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: WLFC) based in Coconut Creek, Florida, is set to disclose their financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Monday, November 4, 2024. The announcement will be made prior to the Nasdaq market opening.

news.headline: Hecla Mining Company appoints Jill Satre to Board of Directors, effective Oct. 16, 2024 - a VP at TC Energy.
news.summary: Hecla Mining Company (NYSE:HL) based in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, has recently appointed Jill Satre to its Board of Directors, a position she will assume starting October 16, 2024. Currently serving as the Vice President of Internal Audit & Corporate Compliance at TC Energy, a prominent North American energy firm, Satre plays a pivotal role in providing strategic guidance and supervision related to compliance, risk management, and internal financial reporting controls. This appointment reflects Hecla Mining Company's commitment to enhancing its board with diverse expertise.

news.headline: Carriage Services declares quarterly dividend of 11.25¢ per share, payable on Dec 2, 2024, to holders as of Nov 4, 2024.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Carriage Services, Inc. (NYSE: CSV) revealed a quarterly dividend of 11.25¢ per share. Scheduled for payment on December 2, 2024, this dividend applies to common share record holders as of November 4, 2024.

news.headline: Call for participation in ASES' 54th Annual National Solar Conference, SOLAR 2025, August 4-6, 2025 in Boulder, CO.
news.summary: The American Solar Energy Society (ASES) is inviting participation for its 54th Annual National Solar Conference, SOLAR 2025, taking place in Boulder, Colorado from August 4-6, 2025. The conference theme, "Innovation for..." is set to explore the latest developments in the solar energy industry. Interested individuals can now submit their proposals for presentations, workshops, and other contributions. This event promises to bring together experts, researchers, and professionals to discuss key topics shaping the future of solar energy. Mark your calendars for this significant event in the renewable energy sector.

news.headline: Gevo receives U.S. DOE loan commitment for net-zero aviation fuel plant in S.Dakota, the world's 1st large-scale facility.
news.summary: The approval of funding for the world's first major net-zero-emissions alcohol-to-jet production facility confirms the project's viability. This significant milestone demonstrates the project's credibility and potential in achieving carbon neutrality.

news.headline: Discover Financial Services beats Q3 earnings estimate with $3.69/share; 10.11% YoY revenue growth to $4.453 billion. Delinquency rates increase YOY.
news.summary: Discover Financial Services (NYSE:DFS) released its third-quarter financial results post Wednesday's market close. Their earnings of $3.69 per share surpassed the analyst consensus of $3.44. Quarterly revenue stood at $4.453 billion, exceeding the estimated $4.346 billion and marking a 10.11% increase from last year's $4.044 billion. The company reported 30+ days delinquency rates of 3.84%, up from 3.41% last year, and 90+ days delinquency rates of 1.87%, up from 1.57%. Notable was Digital Banking's pretax income of $1.2 billion for the quarter. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: FHLBank Chicago announces 2024 Director Election results.
news.summary: The outcome of the 2024 Director Election conducted by the Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago (FHLBank Chicago) has been officially disclosed in Chicago.

news.headline: Amazon Teamsters and allies rally in Queens demanding recognition and negotiation of contract, aiming to stop union-busting at Amazon DBK4 warehouse today.
news.summary: In Queens, New York on October 16, 2024, the Teamsters union urged Amazon to engage in contract negotiations and cease activities aimed at undermining unions. A rally was organized at the Amazon DBK4 warehouse, where Amazon Teamsters, along with their supporters and elected representatives, gathered to press Amazon to acknowledge the demands of the workers.

news.headline: Inseego Corp. will reveal Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 12. Stay tuned for the earnings update.
news.summary: Inseego Corp., headquartered in San Diego, is set to announce its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on November 12, 2024. This information was released via a press release mentioning the forthcoming earnings report. The company's stakeholders and investors are eagerly awaiting the disclosure of its financial results for that quarter, with expectations and speculation on the numbers being high. Inseego Corp.'s financial report will provide insights into its revenue, profits, losses, and overall performance during the specified period, which will be crucial for analysts and shareholders to evaluate the company's trajectory and potential growth prospects.

news.headline: Montana Renewables gets $1.44B commitment from DOE to boost Renewable Fuels & Biomass Energy Facility by 300m gallons/year.
news.summary: Montana Renewables, a company based in Indianapolis, has revealed its plans to increase the production capacity of Sustainable Aviation Fuel by an impressive 300 million gallons annually. This expansion project follows an announcement made by Calumet, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLMT), stating that they have received approval from the U.S. Department of Energy's Loan Programs Office for the project. The development signifies a significant push towards sustainable aviation practices and reducing carbon footprint in the industry.

news.headline: Zapp's partners with Krewe of BOO in New Orleans, bringing bold flavors to Halloween events on Oct. 19.
news.summary: HANOVER, Pennsylvania - Zapp’s™, known for their Cajun-inspired kettle-style potato chips and Pretzel Stix, will be participating in New Orleans’ top Halloween event as the official potato chip partner of Krewe of BOO!, the city’s Official Halloween Parade. Zapp’s will showcase their flavorful snacks at three Halloween festivities on Saturday, October 19. This includes the New Orleans Zombie Run, a 2-mile race starting at 9 a.m. in the W.Character count: 366

news.headline: Judge halts Alabama's voter roll purge ahead of election, protecting X number of voters.
LabTAG and eLabNext partner in Quebec, integrating labels for efficient lab workflow and sample management.
news.summary: LabTAG labels from GA International, based in Laval, Quebec, are now completely integrated with eLabNext, streamlining sample management and improving lab workflow efficiency. This collaboration will optimize organization and productivity for various laboratories.

news.headline: Knife River Corp (NYSE: KNF) to host Q3 2024 earnings call on Nov 4 at 11 a.m. EST. Financial results to release before NYSE market opens. Webcast available.
news.summary: Knife River Corporation (NYSE: KNF), a vertically integrated company in construction materials and contracting services, will conduct its Q3 2024 earnings conference call on Monday, November 4, 2024, at 11 a.m. EST. The financial results will be disclosed before the NYSE market opens that morning. The call can be accessed through a live webcast on the Knife River website's Investors section. The company's third-quarter financial performance will be discussed during the call.

news.headline: Pennsylvania American Water gets $7.9M in PENNVEST loans, grant for infrastructure projects in Pittsburgh and Berks County.
news.summary: Pennsylvania American Water has been granted $7.9 million in low-interest funding from PENNVEST for two crucial infrastructure projects. This includes the substitution of lead service lines in Pittsburgh and repairs to the wastewater collection system in Exeter, Berks County. The Shapiro administration made the announcement, highlighting the company's dedication to offering top-quality services to its customers.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency will continue its rapid growth regardless of the president, states Demirors in an interview with Bloomberg.
Lithium Argentina’s Q3 2024 results to be released on Nov 5, 2024.
Italy plans to increase capital gains tax on Bitcoin, according to sources.
Kinder Morgan Q3 earnings: Revenue and EPS miss, $3.699B revenue, 25 cents EPS, lower guidance, shares decline. Dividend $0.2875.
news.summary: Kinder Morgan Inc (NYSE:KMI) released their third-quarter financial results, revealing earnings of $3.699 billion, falling short of the anticipated $3.975 billion. Quarterly earnings stood at 25 cents per share, below the predicted 27 cents per share. The distributable cash flow amounted to 49 cents per share, with $1.2 billion generated from operations and around $600 million in free cash flow during the period. A dividend of $0.2875 per share for the third quarter was approved by the board, scheduled for payment on Nov. 15 to shareholders on record as of Oct. 31. The company experienced increased financial contributions in the quarter.

news.headline: Lexicon secures exclusive licensing deal with Viatris for Sotagliflozin outside U.S. and Europe, $25M upfront payment.
news.summary: Lexicon is set to receive an initial payment of $25 million along with the possibility of additional payments in the form of regulatory and commercial milestone rewards.

news.headline: Unicycive Therapeutics CEO to join fireside chat at 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit on Oct 17, 2024 at 10 am ET.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Unicycive Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq as UNCY and focused on treatments for kidney disease, shared that their CEO, Shalabh Gupta, M.D., will engage in a fireside chat during the 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit on October 17 at 10:00 a.m. ET. The event is a part of the company's endeavors towards developing therapies for patients with kidney-related conditions.

news.headline: Nurix Therapeutics appoints Anil Kapur to board with 25 years of experience; Oct 15, 2024. #Biopharma #DrugDevelopment
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Nurix Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: NRIX) based in San Francisco disclosed the addition of Anil Kapur to its board of directors, starting October 15, 2024. Kapur brings over 25 years of executive expertise in pharmaceutical and biotech sectors spanning U.S. and global markets. Nurix Therapeutics focuses on developing targeted protein modulation drugs for patients battling cancer and inflammatory conditions.

news.headline: Viatris secures exclusive licensing for Sotagliflozin from Lexicon Pharmaceuticals outside U.S. & Europe, expanding cardiovascular portfolio. leveraging Viatris' global infrastructure. Opportunities to explore additional indications.
news.summary: Viatris Inc. has announced further expansion of its innovative portfolio in cardiovascular diseases, taking advantage of its unique global infrastructure and expertise. The initiative presents opportunities for leveraging the potential of Sotagliflozin into additional indications. The development was disclosed in Pittsburgh on Oct. 16, 2024.

news.headline: Schneider National, Inc. will report Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 6, 2024. Conference call at 10:30 am ET, dial 646-307-1963.
news.summary: Schneider, a leading transportation and logistics services provider, will be releasing its third quarter 2024 financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, November 6, 2024. A conference call to discuss these results will take place at 10:30 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day. To join the call, dial toll-free numbers 646-307-1963 or 800-715-9871 (conference ID: 2793697). Additionally, the company will stream the call live on their website.

news.headline: Lucid Group, Inc. to offer 262,446,931 shares of common stock in public offering with affiliate investment.
news.summary: In Newark, California on October 16, 2024, Lucid Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: LCID) declared the start of a public offering of 262,446,931 shares of its common stock. The underwriter has the option to sell these shares periodically in one or multiple transactions.

news.headline: Coherent grants Chief Financial Officer RSUs and PSUs under NYSE Rule 303A.08. CFO Sherri R. Luther received awards on Oct 11, 2024.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Coherent Corp. revealed that they granted restricted stock units (RSUs) and performance stock units (PSUs) to their new Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer, Sherri R. Luther. These awards were given on her starting date, October 11, 2024, as part of the offer letter agreement with Ms. Luther to entice her to join the company. Coherent Corp., renowned for its expertise in materials, networking, and lasers, made this strategic move to solidify Ms. Luther’s role in the organization. The Company traded on NYSE under the ticker symbol COHR.

news.headline: Apple will lose their Chief People Officer after less than two years.
Italy plans to increase capital gains tax on Bitcoin. Stay updated for more details. #cryptocurrency #taxes

Zacks Gaming sees industry growth with younger demographic spending, interest rate cuts. Stocks to watch: Flutter Entertainment, DoubleDown Interactive, GDEV Inc. Macau gaming revenues up 15.5% in September. Fed's rate projection suggests lower cost of borrowing for gaming companies.
news.summary: The Zacks Gaming industry is seeing growth due to macroeconomic factors like the Federal Reserve's interest rate reduction and a rise in demand for sports betting. Increased visitation and spending per visit, particularly among younger demographics, are driving this upsurge. Stocks like Flutter Entertainment plc (NYSE: FLUT), DoubleDown Interactive Co., Ltd. (NASDAQ: DDI), and GDEV Inc. (NASDAQ: GDEV) are expected to benefit from this trend. The industry comprises companies operating integrated casinos, hotels, technology products, and services related to gaming. The Federal Reserve's interest rate cut and an increase in Macau's gaming revenues, which rose by 15.5% year over year in September, are key factors driving industry growth. The interest rate reduction helps lower borrowing costs for gaming companies, enabling them to finance operations and expansion projects more affordably. Robust investments and improving visitation in Macau are also contributing to the industry's positive performance.

news.headline: Liberty Energy Inc. reports $1.1 billion in revenue, $74 million in net income, and $248 million in adjusted EBITDA for Q3 2024.
news.summary: In Denver, Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) shared its third quarter 2024 financial and operational outcomes. The Company reported revenue of $1.1 billion, marking a 2% sequential decline. Net income amounted to $74 million, equivalent to $0.44 fully diluted earnings per share (“EPS”). Furthermore, Liberty disclosed an Adjusted EBITDA of $248 million and achieved a 22% TTM Adjusted Pre-Tax Return on Capital Employed (“ROCE”). Additionally, the Company distributed $51 million to shareholders through a combination of share repurchases and cash dividends.

news.headline: Apple stock has been trading sideways since July, with shares closing at the same price as a week before the last all-time high. In the past three months, they've fallen up to 20% and rallied the same amount. Technical perspective shows higher lows since August but lack of higher highs. Fed intends to cut rates while S&P 500 index is at highs. This apparent divergence might be a good entry opportunity.
news.summary: Apple Inc's stock (NASDAQ: AAPL) has been trading sideways since July, with shares closing at the same price as a week before reaching their last all-time high. In the past three months, they fell up to 20% and then rallied by the same amount. From a technical standpoint, the stock hasn't been forming a bullish pattern despite higher lows since August. The lack of higher highs is concerning, especially as the Fed plans rate cuts and the S&P 500 is at highs. This divergence may present a good entry opportunity for investors. For more details, check out the full story on Benzinga.com.

Q2 Holdings, Inc. will review its Q3 2024 financial results in an investor conference call on November 6, 2024 at 5:00 p.m. EST.
news.summary: Q2 Holdings, Inc. will announce its financial results for Q3 2024 after the market closes on November 6, 2024. The company, traded on NYSE under QTWO, is a leading provider of digital transformation solutions for financial services. A conference call discussing the results will be held the same day at 5:00 p.m. EST, hosted by Chairman & CEO Matt Flake and Prospecti Jonathan Price. Make sure to tune in for important updates on the company's performance.

news.headline: Agilent will announce Q4 fiscal year 2024 results on Nov. 25.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Agilent is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2024 on November 25th.

news.headline: Marin Software (NASDAQ: MRIN) will report Q3 2024 results on October 31, 2024, after market close and host a call at 2:00 PM PT/5:00 PM ET.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Marin Software Incorporated (NASDAQ: MRIN), a top digital marketing software provider for performance-driven advertisers and agencies, disclosed it will reveal its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, post-market closure on Thursday, October 31, 2024. Furthermore, the firm stated it will conduct a conference call on the same day at 2:00 PM Pacific Time (5:00 PM Eastern Time) to deliberate on its quarterly financial report.

news.headline: Vision RNG gets $207M financing from HASI to build 2 LFG-to-RNG projects in Ohio; aims to support climate initiatives.
news.summary: Vision RNG, a Renewable Natural Gas developer based in Canonsburg, Pennsylvania, has recently announced the successful acquisition of $207 million in financing. This funding was secured in partnership with HASI, a prominent investor known for its commitment to supporting climate initiatives. The substantial investment will be instrumental in supporting Vision RNG's current projects and furthering their efforts in the renewable energy sector.

news.headline: ETH futures open interest hits record high, history shows crashes follow ETH open interest peaks.
news.summary: The open interest for Ethereum futures has reached a record high, indicating strong market activity. However, historical data suggests that following such peaks in open interest, there tends to be a subsequent decrease in the price of Ethereum. This trend highlights the potential for a price downturn in ETH following the current surge in futures interest.

news.headline: Rocket Lab schedules a last-minute Electron launch in 3 days for the mission "Changes In Latitudes, Changes In Attitudes."
news.summary: In Long Beach, California, Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (Nasdaq: RKLB) has revealed a new addition to its upcoming launch schedule. The company, a prominent player in the space industry, is gearing up for a last-minute Electron launch. This commercial mission, named 'Changes In Latitudes, Changes In Attitudes', is set to take off from Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1 in just three days. The launch window is scheduled to open on October 19th. Rocket Lab continues to solidify its position as a key player in the space sector, offering top-tier launch services and space systems to its global clientele.

news.headline: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp reports record Q3 2024 earnings of $22.1M, $29.96 per share, with solid liquidity & credit quality; total assets at $5.4B.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, Farmers & Merchants Bancorp reported record net income of $22.1 million, or $29.96 per share, marking a 2.50% increase from the same quarter in 2023. The return on average assets was 1.65% and the return on average equity was 15.03%. The company had $1.5 billion in cash and investment securities and a borrowing capacity of $2.1 billion. Total assets were $5.4 billion, with total loans and leases at $3.7 billion and total deposits at $4.7 billion. The company's credit quality remained strong with a total allowance for credit losses of 2.11%. Additionally, the company's capital ratios were robust, with a total risk-based capital ratio of 14.95% and a tangible common equity ratio of 10.91%. Net interest income for the quarter was $52.0 million, with an increase in the net interest margin to 4.07%. The company also highlighted its achievements, being named the #2 best performing bank in the nation and receiving other accolades for its performance in the banking sector. Farmers & Merchants Bancorp's steady growth and strong financial position were underscored in the report.

news.headline: Oil prices dropped 2% after OPEC cut global demand forecast. WTI crude fell to $74/barrel. OPEC lowered 2024 demand growth estimate to 105.8 million bpd, now at 1.93 million bpd.
news.summary: Oil prices dropped over 2% as OPEC revised its global oil demand growth estimate for the third consecutive month. West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude fell 2.2% to below $74 a barrel. OPEC cut its 2024 oil demand growth estimate by 106,000 barrels per day to 1.93 million bpd. The forecast for 2025 was reduced by 102,000 bpd to 1.6 million bpd. This brings the total global oil demand in 2024 to 105.8 million bpd. Investor concerns over Chinese fiscal stimulus also impacted commodity markets.

news.headline: Civeo Corporation sets Q3 2024 earnings call on Oct 30, 10:00 am CT to discuss financial results. Phone: 877-423-9813.
news.summary: Civeo Corporation (NYSE:CVEO) has confirmed the date for its third quarter 2024 earnings conference call to be Wednesday, October 30th, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time (11:00 a.m. Eastern Time). The financial and operating results for the third quarter will be addressed during this call, which is set to be released before the market opens on the same day. For those interested in participating, the numbers to dial are 877-423-9813 within the U.S. or 201-689-8573 for international callers.

news.headline: Analyst initiates bullish outlook for Apellis Pharmaceuticals, highlighting Syfovre success targeting complement C3. Empaveli faces competition from Novartis AG. Market opportunity in C3 glomerulopathy.
news.summary: A recent report from William Blair has covered Apellis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:APLS) and highlighted the company's successful targeting of complement C3, resulting in the approval of two therapies: Empaveli for paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria and Syfovre for geographic atrophy secondary to age-related macular degeneration. Despite Empaveli's strong position in the PNH market, challenges are expected due to the arrival of a new competitor, Novartis AG’s Fabhalta. The report also mentions the potential market opportunities for Empaveli in C3 glomerulopathy (C3G) and immune-complex membranoproliferative glomerulonephritis (IC-MPGN). Additionally, Apellis Pharmaceuticals’ Pegcetacoplan has shown promising results in a late-stage study for rare kidney diseases. For the full story, refer to Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ripple CLO says Chevron case won't affect SEC. SEC filed 20+ lawsuits in 2023 against crypto firms and individuals.
news.summary: During the year 2023, the Securities and Exchange Commission took legal action by filing more than 20 lawsuits against companies and individuals operating within the cryptocurrency industry.

news.headline: Senseonics hosting virtual event on Eversense 365, discussing FDA clearance and plans for one-year CGM system with experts and management.
news.summary: A recent event showcased Dr. David T. Ahn from Hoag Medical Group and Dr. Jeff Ciaramita from Mercy Health System. The event also included management personnel. Dr. Ahn shared insights from Hoag Medical Group, while Dr. Ciaramita presented on behalf of Mercy Health System. Both doctors discussed key aspects of their respective medical practices.

news.headline: Luna Innovations appoints William Phelan as new CFO, succeeding John Roiko, who joined in May 2024. Phelan takes over effective immediately.
news.summary: In Roanoke, Virginia, Luna Innovations Incorporated (NASDAQ: LUNA) has appointed William L. Phelan as the new Chief Financial Officer and Chief Accounting Officer. Phelan takes over from John Roiko, who came out of retirement in May 2024 to play a crucial role in setting up Luna's strong base for future expansion. The change is effective immediately. Luna Innovations is a global leader in advanced fiber optic-based technology.

news.headline: CEO Ferreira highlights National Bank's Canada focus, emphasizing growth potential and stability. #Banking #Canada
